query:
-- First, let's update existing entities or insert new ones with EIN data
-- Update LAWS LLC if it exists, or insert
INSERT INTO business_entities (userId, name, entityType, status, ein, stateOfFormation, description, trustLevel)
VALUES (1, 'LuvOnPurpose Autonomous Wealth System LLC', 'llc', 'active', NULL, 'Delaware', 'Primary operating entity for automation consulting', 1)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE ein = VALUES(ein), stateOfFormation = VALUES(stateOfFormation);

-- Insert The L.A.W.S. Collective LLC
INSERT INTO business_entities (userId, name, entityType, status, ein, stateOfFormation, description, trustLevel)
VALUES (1, 'The L.A.W.S. Collective, LLC', 'collective', 'active', '39-3122993', 'Delaware', 'Umbrella collective for community development', 1)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE ein = VALUES(ein), stateOfFormation = VALUES(stateOfFormation);

-- Insert Real-Eye-Nation LLC
INSERT INTO business_entities (userId, name, entityType, status, ein, stateOfFormation, stateEntityId, description, trustLevel)
VALUES (1, 'Real-Eye-Nation LLC', 'llc', 'active', '84-4976416', 'Georgia', '20031738', 'Media and content creation entity', 1)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE ein = VALUES(ein), stateOfFormation = VALUES(stateOfFormation), stateEntityId = VALUES(stateEntityId);

-- Insert Academy 508(c)(1)(A) - pending EIN
INSERT INTO business_entities (userId, name, entityType, status, ein, stateOfFormation, description, trustLevel)
VALUES (1, 'LuvOnPurpose Outreach Temple and Academy Society', 'trust', 'draft', NULL, NULL, '508(c)(1)(A) religious/educational organization - EIN pending', 1)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE description = VALUES(description);
